---
title: "2026 FIFA World Cup Squad Analysis"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    theme: cosmo
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

players <- read_csv("player_data.csv", show_col_types = FALSE)

players_enriched <- players %>%
  mutate(
    birth_year = as.integer(format(date_of_birth, "%Y")),
    birth_month = factor(format(date_of_birth, "%b"), levels = month.abb, ordered = TRUE),
    position_group = str_remove(position, "^\\d+"),
    age_band = cut(
      age,
      breaks = c(0, 22, 26, 30, Inf),
      labels = c("22 and under", "23-26", "27-30", "31+"),
      right = TRUE
    ),
    goals_per_cap = if_else(caps > 0, goals / caps, NA_real_)
  )

team_age_summary <- players_enriched %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_age = median(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    players = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_age))

team_caps_summary <- players_enriched %>%
  group_by(team) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_caps = mean(caps, na.rm = TRUE),
    total_goals = sum(goals, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(avg_caps))

position_summary <- players_enriched %>%
  group_by(position_group) %>%
  summarise(
    avg_age = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_caps = mean(caps, na.rm = TRUE),
    avg_goals_per_cap = mean(goals_per_cap, na.rm = TRUE),
    players = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```

## Squad Age Profile

The chart below compares average squad age across the teams in the dataset.

```{r}
team_age_summary %>%
  mutate(team = fct_reorder(team, avg_age)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = avg_age, y = team)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#0f766e", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(avg_age, 1)), hjust = -0.15, size = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Average player age",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Average squad age by team",
    subtitle = "Calculated from the player data scraped from Wikipedia"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, max(team_age_summary$avg_age) + 2)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

## Experience Profile

```{r}
team_caps_summary %>%
  mutate(team = fct_reorder(team, avg_caps)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = avg_caps, y = team)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#7c3aed", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(avg_caps, 1)), hjust = -0.15, size = 3) +
  labs(
    x = "Average caps per player",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Average international experience by team",
    subtitle = "Mean caps per squad member"
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, max(team_caps_summary$avg_caps) + 5)) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

## Position Comparison

```{r}
position_summary %>%
  mutate(position_group = fct_reorder(position_group, avg_age)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = position_group, y = avg_age, fill = position_group)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_text(aes(label = round(avg_age, 1)), vjust = -0.35, size = 3) +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Average age",
    title = "Average age by position group"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

## Overall Distribution

```{r}
players_enriched %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = age)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 2, fill = "#f97316", color = "white") +
  labs(
    x = "Age",
    y = "Number of players",
    title = "Age distribution across all players"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

## Age And Caps

```{r}
players_enriched %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = caps, y = age, color = position_group)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  geom_smooth(se = FALSE, method = "loess", linewidth = 0.7, color = "#111827") +
  labs(
    x = "Caps",
    y = "Age",
    color = "Position",
    title = "Player age and experience",
    subtitle = "Each point is a player"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"))
```

## Birth Month Mix

```{r}
players_enriched %>%
  count(birth_month) %>%
  mutate(birth_month = fct_reorder(birth_month, n)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = n, y = birth_month)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.75, fill = "#0ea5e9") +
  geom_text(aes(label = n), hjust = -0.15, size = 3.5, color = "#0f172a") +
  labs(
    x = NULL,
    y = "Players",
    title = "Birth month distribution",
    subtitle = "A quick view of how the squad is spread across the calendar"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, max(count(players_enriched, birth_month)$n) + 3))
```
